curatorNote:
Through one thousand studies of a string wrapped around pegs, Ringers provides proof that constraint produces inexhaustible variety. When viewed within grids, patterns emerge - symmetry and chaos, repetition and anomaly - revealing the full shape of the algorithm's logic.

Hivemind has curated a selection of Ringers across notable traits, including Red Background, Yellow Background and Bullseye. Five pieces previously resided in 3AC's Starry Night collection alongside The Goose.
